title: Nubit Grid Query Protocol
description: Query parameters exchanged between @nubitio/crud (HydraRemoteDataSource) and Nubit\ApiPlatform\Doctrine\Filter\DataGridFilter. Attach as x-grid-protocol on the API root or document in OpenAPI.

sort.description: JSON-encoded sort descriptors. Each item: { selector: string, desc?: boolean }.

filter.description: JSON-encoded filter expression tree (DevExtreme-style). Leaf nodes: [field, operator, value].

searchValue.description: Global search string applied across filterable columns.

x-response-headers.X-Grid-Summary: JSON map of field → aggregate for columns with x-crud.summable
